shorts.content: The Calder Cup Playoffs are down to four teams. None of the regular season’s four division champions remain as the Laval Rocket also went home early. Now the Wilkes-Barre/Scranton Penguins and Toronto Marlies both move on to the best-of-seven Eastern Conferen…

shorts.title_distilled: Railriders blank Mets 4-0 behind no-hitter from pitching staff.
shorts.description: (WBRE/WYOU) – The Scranton/Wilkes-Barre Railriders played the Syracuse Mets Friday Night on the road at NBT Bank Stadium. The Railriders won the game 2-0 and pitched a no-hitter. Brendan Beck and Carson Coleman combined for nine shutout innings. Beck pitched the first seven innings, which tied a career high, and struck out six batters and [...]

shorts.description: (WBRE/WYOU)— The Wilkes-Barre/Scranton Penguins fall in Game 5 to the Toronto Marlies 5-1, as the team now sits on the brink of elimination ahead of Game 6 at Mohegan Arena. The Penguins struck first on the power play as Mikhail Ilyin tucked it under the top post with just under 15 minutes to go in [...]
